titleStmt.title: SII 34.91: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 91. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the entrance, left side, into the gōpura of the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājarāja III, 19th year, Vṛiśchika, sudi 11, Wednesday, Śatabhisaj = A.D. 1234, October 4, Wednesday.

It records that a vāṇiya-mudali of Gaṅgaikoṇḍa-chōḻa-puram called Uyyavantāṉ Iṉtarāyaṉ gifted a nāḻi of gingili oil from the oilmill (chekku) working in Jinachintāmaṇi-perunteru in Kāmadavalli-chaturvēdimaṅgalam for a perpetual lamp in the Tirukkāṟkōtīśvaram temple of the place. He prayed that the future mudalis also should maintain the gift. Otherwise they would be considered as outcaste members.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉa cakkaravattikaḷ śrī Irācarāca
tēvarkku yāṇṭu pattoṉmpatāvatu śrīyajat ma
hāpōti piṟantuṭaiyavāmaṟku vāmāṉāyakar ga
ṅkaikoṇṭa cōḻapurattu vāṇiyamutalikaḷil
marutuṭaiyāṉ Uyyavantāṉāṉa Iṉtarāyaṉē
n mirucciya nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu teciyum putaṉ
kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cataiyattu nāḷ vikkirama cōḻa
vaḷanāṭṭu śrī kāmatavalliccaruppētimaṅkala
ttu Uṭaiyār tirukkāṟkōṭiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟkku tiruṉuntāviḷakkuk kuṭalāka Ivūr ciṉa
cintāmaṇi perunteruvil Iṭṭu tirikiṟace
kkil nāḷ Oṉṟukku Upaiyamāka Aḷakkum Eḷ
Eṇṇai nāḻiyum cantirātittavarai
Aḷakka kaṭavatākavum mēlvarumutalikaḷu Ippaṭi ce
yyavum kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi ceyyātār na
m Iṉattil Oruvar Allātārākavum cantirā
tittavarai cella kalveṭṭik kuṭuttō
m vāṇiyarōm Ippaṭikku Ivai nakarak kaṇakku ci
ṟu kuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu ....
Digital edition of SII 34.91 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
